description: You are a Digital Researcher for a publishing company compiling assets for a book on 'Art of the New Deal'. From the Library of Congress (https://www.loc.gov), curate and download 3 distinct high-resolution WPA National Park posters. Ensure you obtain the highest resolution format available (TIFF or high-res JPEG) for each. Save the images to ~/Documents/curated_images/ with descriptive filenames. Additionally, create a citation file at ~/Documents/curated_images/credits.json containing a list of objects for each image with the following keys: 'title', 'date', 'call_number', 'download_filename', and 'source_url'.
